birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In northern Angola, the white-headed robin-chat has only been recorded in two areas, including the type locality about north of Calandula. In the western Democratic Republic of the Congo, it has been recorded in Bombo-Lumene Forest Reserve and a few nearby sites. In Angola, the bird occurs in the undergrowth of gallery forests at an elevation of , and it is sometimes found in savannas
